subject: An open hinged locket of bio-mechanical Simic design, cracked open to release a radiant blue orb of aether or magical energy, suspended against an oceanic abyssal background.
description: A close-up still life of an ornate hinged locket floating in a deep blue-teal abyss. The locket is rendered in the Simic guild's signature bio-mechanical hybrid style — its outer chassis suggests fish-scale plating, coral-like ridges, and organic curves fused with metalwork. The locket has been opened, revealing a luminous orb of pale blue energy at its core that casts soft cyan light outward. Tiny particles and motes drift around the artifact, evoking submerged bioluminescence or floating aether. The background is a gradient of dark teal to near-black, with hazy currents suggesting deep water. No figures are present; the composition is centered entirely on the artifact and the radiant energy it contains.
foreground: Open bio-mechanical locket emitting a glowing blue orb of energy, with floating motes and particles around it.
background: Deep abyssal blue-teal gradient suggesting open ocean or aetheric void, with diffuse light rays and drifting particles.
emotion: serene, contemplative — the artifact glows quietly, suggesting hidden meaning held within
